invariants: Do not invent architecture or packaging behavior.
JSON TaskPacket workflow is the default supervisor path.
Distinguish clearly between generated and static surfaces.

steps.task: Trace the implementation of the JSON TaskPacket system and exported operator prompt generation. Identify source files, modules, templates, and package data involved in: TaskPacket validation, tp series exec/status/finalize, dopetask init, operator_profile generation, and EXPORTED_OPERATOR_PROMPT generation. Capture exact file paths and relationships.

Write an audit report at docs/audits/DOPETASK_057_PROMPT_PIPELINE_AUDIT.md covering: (1) how EXPORTED_OPERATOR_PROMPT.md is generated, (2) how JSON TaskPacket system relates to prompt generation, (3) which components are generated vs static, (4) which capabilities are shipped vs repo-only, and (5) evidence for each conclusion. Include classification tables.

Write downstream install contract at docs/audits/DOPETASK_057_DOWNSTREAM_INSTALL_CONTRACT.md defining what dopetask init provides, what must or may be added manually, and the correct usage model for consumer repos. Only use repo evidence. Document uncertainty if present.
